title: Write a cover letter as a 1st year international business student:

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Write a cover letter as a 1st year international business student:

Student Analyst for AI Analytics
København S, DK, 2300
Job ID: 17642 


Would you like to work with Business Intelligence to understand the past, present and the future? We are now looking for a Student Analyst to join the AI & Analytics team within Digital Wealth. You will play a key role in developing the bank’s use of BI through Power BI to ensure that we use facts to take the right decisions and develop the right solutions. The need to use BI as a strategic asset internally and with our customers is rapidly increasing, and the AI & Analytics team is in the centre of this development. The AI Analytics team is a part of Digital Wealth and have a fundamental role in developing the banks understanding of data and analytics within the saving and investment area.

 

At Nordea, we know our customers’ needs are changing – and we’re deeply committed to meeting them with the financial solutions of tomorrow. We’re creating an agile environment where we’re harnessing the power of technology – one where you can make an impact. So bring your skills, ideas and unique background. With us, you’ll find plenty of opportunities to grow and make your mark on something bigger.

About this opportunity

Your main focus area will be Power BI, with focus on taking our customer experience to the next level both in regard to the visual presentation and making it intuitive to apply. We have close collaboration with many different business areas and enable them to get value from their data, and empower employees to do analytics.


To find pleasure in the job, you have a keen eye on the visual experience and are eager to apply business understanding to our Power BI reports. We have a high focus on data and analytics, but are very aware of the importance of design and the psychologies of a well presented solution.

What you’ll be doing:

Developing Power BI reports
Supporting stakeholder in utilizing Power BI
Documenting solution requirements from our different business areas

Welcome to a highly dedicated and passionate team where creating business value and developing innovative technical solutions is top of mind. We encourage continuous learning in an informal and agile workplace with a high level of freedom. We expect a lot of our team members when it comes to taking responsibility and ownership of tasks and deadlines, but we stand shoulder by shoulder when celebrating our achievements and mitigating our failures.

The role is based in Copenhagen. We expect you to work 20 hours a week, but are flexible around exams. 

Who you are

Collaboration. Ownership. Passion. Courage. These are the values that guide us in being at our best – and that we imagine you share with us.  

You have minimum 2-3 years left of a relevant Bachelor (BSc) / Master degree (MSc) within IT, economics, finance or a similar technical discipline. You are self-driven and feel comfortable engaging with stakeholders across the organization.

Furthermore, to succeed in this role, we believe that you have:

Experience in design and maintaining data reports
Experience in Power BI is a plus, but eager to learn can compensate
Willingness to learn and apply Dax language
Primary field of interest is Finance, automation and/or digital solutions which is reflected in your choice of courses

If this sounds like you, get in touch!

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the position of Student Analyst for AI Analytics with Nordea, as advertised on your website. As a first-year international business student, I am very excited about the opportunity to join the team at Nordea and work in the area of Business Intelligence to understand the past, present, and future.

I have a keen interest in the use of data and analytics to drive business decisions, and have completed coursework in IT and finance that I believe make me a strong candidate for this position. Additionally, I possess experience in designing and maintaining data reports, which I have gained through various coursework and projects throughout my academic career.

I am a quick learner and would be eager to gain experience with Power BI and the Dax language, skills which I believe will be essential for this role. Moreover, I am confident that my passion for finance and automation, as well as digital solutions, can help me contribute positively to your team.

I appreciate that Nordea is a company that values collaboration, ownership, passion, and courage, and I believe that these values are closely aligned with my own personal values. I am excited about the opportunity to work in an informal and agile workplace and grow both professionally and personally with the team at Nordea.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute to your team and help drive success through the use of Business Intelligence.

Kind regards,

[Your Name]

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Write a cover letter as a 1st year international business student:

Student for Credit Risk Information and Control
København S, DK, 2300
Job ID: 17231 

Would you like to gain professional experience in an international credit risk unit? We are now looking for a Student to support the team, working with credit risk data and presentations.

At Nordea, we see that the world is changing fast – and we want to be one step ahead of the curve. That’s why we’re deeply committed to providing the financial solutions of tomorrow to our customers. We’re creating an agile environment where we experiment and grow together – and we need your ideas and unique background. With us, you’ll be in good company with a chance to make your mark on something bigger.   

About this opportunity
 

Welcome to the Credit Risk Information team. We add value by delivering clear and precise credit risk reporting for senior management and Nordea’s Financial Reports. The team operates in all four Nordic countries. As the Student, you’ll play a valuable role in maintaining and improving our reporting and control processes. 


What you’ll be doing: 

Compile and analyse credit risk data.
Prepare data and support the team during reporting periods.
Perform deep dives into credit risk data to investigate and ensure quality.
Support with developing and improving credit risk reporting.
Perform credit risk management controls.
 

You’ll join a Nordic team with a great work environment. The role is based in Copenhagen and will be around 15 hours a week.


Who you are

Collaboration. Ownership. Passion. Courage. These are the values that guide us in being at our best – and that we imagine you share with us.  
 

To succeed in this role, we believe that you:

Enjoy cooperating with your colleagues.
Can be flexible during quarterly reporting and, likewise, we are flexible around exam periods.
Are eager to learn and you take initiative to solve tasks and support the team.
 

Your experience and background:   

You are a student with minimum two years of relevant studies (Economics, Finance, Mathematics or Engineering), or preferably a Bachelor's degree.
You are proficient in the MS office suit (especially Excel).
You are fluent in English both written and spoken.

If this sounds like you, get in touch!

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am very excited to apply for the position of Student for Credit Risk Information and Control with Nordea, as advertised on your website. As a first-year international business student, I am eager to gain professional experience in an international credit risk unit and believe that this role offers a valuable opportunity for me to do so.

I appreciate Nordea's commitment to providing the financial solutions of tomorrow to its customers and to creating an agile environment where employees can experiment and grow together. I share these values and believe that I can contribute positively to your team.

I am a self-motivated student with a passion for finance and mathematics, and I am excited to apply my knowledge and skills to the work required in this role. I have experience in compiling and analyzing data, and I am proficient in the MS Office suite, particularly Excel. Additionally, I believe my strong analytical and problem-solving skills make me an ideal candidate for this position.

I appreciate the importance of collaboration, ownership, passion, and courage in the workplace, and I am committed to adhering to these values. Furthermore, I am flexible and am willing to work around the quarterly reporting period and exam periods to support the team.

Thank you for considering my application. I would be excited to discuss in further detail how I can contribute to the team at Nordea and gain valuable professional experience in the process.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Write a cover letter as a 1st year international business student:

Student med fokus på dansk makro eller rentemarkeder

Er du interesseret i at følge med i, hvad der rører sig i global økonomi og/eller globale rentemarkeder? Vil du forstå makroøkonomiens samspil med de finansielle markeder, og er du i stand til at kommunikere din viden til omverdenen? Så er du måske en af vores to nye studenter i Danske Bank Markets.

Du bliver en del af Global Research, hvis primære opgave er at analysere økonomiske og finansielle forhold, til brug både internt, i forhold til bankens største kunder og i forhold til medierne, der bruger vores analyser.

Du bliver en del af et stort analyseteam, hvor du, ud over de faste økonomer og analytikere, også får tre andre studenter som kolleger. Du bliver desuden en del af den største finansielle virksomhed i Danmark og får en god platform for en videre karriere i koncernen efter endt studie.

Velkommen til en verden af økonomiske og finansielle sammenhænge

Du vil som student i vores analyseenhed få mulighed for at komme helt tæt på økonomien og de finansielle markeder - og du vil få mulighed for at lære, hvordan vi laver makro- og renteanalyser samt finansiel rådgivning i praksis.

Vi søger to studenter. En med et primært fokusområde på dansk økonomi og en med et primært fokusområde på globale og danske rente- og obligationsmarkeder. Det medfører opgaver så som:
Analysere elementer af især dansk økonomi og i at assistere med udarbejdelsen og udviklingen af vores analyseværktøjer og publikationer.
Optimere vores tekniske platform (Excel, VBA, Python) indenfor renter- og obligationer
Du vil få ansvaret for både faste drifts- og analyseopgaver men også udviklingsorienterede opgaver, hvor du gradvist får muligheden for at få indflydelse på analysearbejdet.
Arbejdsmiljøet hos Danske Bank Markets er engagerende og indlæringskurven er stejl. Vi lægger stor vægt på at arbejde i teams, og at høje ambitioner ikke er en hindring for et godt socialt samvær.

Dygtig analytiker med gode formidlingsevner

Vi forestiller os, at du er på sidste år af din bachelor eller første år af kandidatuddannelsen på en Økonomi/Finansierings-uddannelse – det er dog ikke et krav. Du er analytisk dygtig, er en god formidler, og at du kan lide at arbejde med tal/data. Udover at du har flair og interesse for det analytiske, forventer vi, at du:
er nidkær i forhold til løsning af opgaverne, da de vil være et vigtigt input til den videre kunderådgivning og i vores kommunikation med medierne.
begår dig professionelt skriftligt og mundtligt på engelsk og gerne også på dansk.
har IT-mæssig flair og erfaring for stillingen rettet mod rentemarkederne
Du får et spændende job i et internationalt og motiverende miljø, hvor mulighederne for personlig og professionel udvikling er store.

”Der er et godt socialt og fagligt fællesskab, og du får mulighed for at arbejde tæt sammen med og suge viden til dig fra nogle af landets førende økonomer. Har du interesse for makroøkonomi i praksis og lyst til et studiejob med et stort ansvar fra dag 1, så synes jeg, du skal søge stillingen,” fortæller Kirstine Grønborg Kundby-Nielsen, student og kommende fuldtidsmedarbejder i Global Research.

”Du kommer til at arbejde sammen med og suge viden til dig fra nogen af landets dygtigste og mest citerede økonomer, og du vil opleve, at de analyser du bidrager til bruges bredt i det danske mediebillede. Sidst men ikke mindst er der et rigtig godt socialt fællesskab både på kontoret, men også til diverse sociale arrangementer uden for arbejdstiden.” supplerer Magnus Poulsen, student med fokus på dansk økonomi.

Stillingen indebærer 20 timer om ugen, men vi er selvfølgelig fleksible i eksamensperioder og støtter fuldt ud op om færdiggørelsen af dit studie.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my interest in the position of Student for Credit Risk Information and Control with Danske Bank Markets, as advertised on your website. As a first-year international business student, I am very excited about the opportunity to join Danke Bank's Global Research team, where I will be able to gain valuable insights into global economics and financial markets.

I am passionate about understanding the macroeconomic and financial aspects of the world and believe that this position will allow me to apply my academic knowledge practically and develop my skills in economic analysis. I am a self-motivated individual and have excellent analytical and communication skills. I am confident that I can contribute effectively to the team and assist in delivering high-quality credit risk reporting.

I am eager to gain experience working with an international financial organization like Danske Bank and learn from leading industry professionals. I possess good numerical skills and am comfortable working with data and different analytical tools like Excel, VBA, and Python.

I also believe that my strong language skills, both written and spoken, in both English and Danish, will enable me to be an effective communicator and team player in the workplace. I am very committed to achieving my goals and responsibilities and am confident that I will make a positive contribution to your team.

Thank you for considering my application, and I look forward to the opportunity to join your esteemed organization and work with your dedicated team.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
